title: Pumpkin Head Iron Golem
description: Gives Iron Golems a Pumpkin Head :D
body:
## **⚠️ Requires Optifine, or any mod that allows resource packs to use custom models (CEM Custom Entity Models, or EMF Entity Model Features)**

A resource pack that changes the Iron Golem's head to a carved pumpkin, similarly to Snow Golems.
I've seen a bunch of texture packs that remove the villager(themed mobs) noses, but a lot of them don't include the Iron Golem, plus it doesn't make sense how the Snow Golem's head is a pumpkin but the Iron Golem's isn't, so I made a texture pack that makes it have a pumpkin head, similarly to Snow Golems!

Shaders used in showcase images are Complimentary Reimagined.

![Screenshot of Minecraft with an Iron Golem with a pumpkin head.](https://i.imgur.com/W8ZptsX.png)

Should work on Minecraft versions 1.18 and up. I have not tested older versions, but I don't see why they wouldn't work so long as custom models work the same there. **Ignore warnings that say it is not suited for your current version if on a version above 1.18.**

(Planning to eventually add a feature where if you name an Iron Golem "Sheared" it shears the pumpkin off, revealing an equally goofy head underneath similar to the Snow Golem's.)

Available on [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/iron-golem-with-pumpkin-head-optifine/) as well.

Future plans: Update 1.21.5 Iron Golem spawn egg item texture to match entity texture

![Screenshot of Minecraft with an Iron Golem with a pumpkin head.](https://i.imgur.com/z5Am1SO.png)
